text.title: Laravel Decomposition Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the Action/DTO/FormRequest/Resource/Policy decomposition for Laravel. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Each Action class MUST express exactly one verb (`CreateUserAction`, `MarkInvoicePaidAction`). The Action's single public method `execute()` MUST do that verb and nothing else.
rule.rationale: One verb = one diff surface; multi-verb Actions become mini-services and lose the testability + reuse story.

rule.statement: DTOs MUST use PHP 8.1+ readonly constructor promotion. DTOs MUST be constructed from FormRequests via a single factory method `::fromRequest(FormRequest $r)` — controllers MUST NOT hand-build DTOs from `$request->input()`.
rule.rationale: Readonly DTOs are tamper-proof inside a request lifecycle; one factory site keeps the mapping testable and consistent.

rule.statement: Controller methods MUST be ≤150 lines and MUST only: validate via FormRequest, build DTO via `::fromRequest`, dispatch to one Action, return a Resource. Business logic MUST NOT live in controllers.
rule.rationale: Fat controllers explode the surface area that LLM agents must re-read on every change; thin controllers keep diffs scoped.

rule.statement: API Resources MUST list every output field explicitly. `$this->all()`, `$this->toArray()`, and spread operators are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Implicit field lists leak `password_hash`, `remember_token`, soft-delete columns when the model adds a field; explicit lists fail loudly on missing fields.

rule.statement: Code MUST live in one of: `App\Actions\*`, `App\DTOs\*`, `App\Http\Controllers\*`, `App\Http\Requests\*`, `App\Http\Resources\*`, `App\Policies\*`, `App\Services\*`, `App\Repositories\*`, `App\Models\*`. Inventing `Manager`, `Coordinator`, `Handler` requires an ADR.
rule.rationale: Ad-hoc layers fragment the convention and re-introduce the very thing decomposition was meant to fix.

rule.statement: `execute()` MUST return the canonical entity (`User`, `Order`) or a result object (`InvoiceCreatedResult`). `void` return is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Queue jobs and console commands compose Actions; void breaks composition and forces refetching the just-created entity from the DB.
